micropython.source:
from microbit import *
import radio
radio.config(group=31)
radio.on()

while True:
    message = radio.receive()
    if message:
        if message == 'angry':
            display.show(Image.ANGRY)
            audio.play(Sound.SOARING)
            sleep(2000)
            display.clear()
        elif message == 'skull':
            display.show(Image.SKULL)
            audio.play(Sound.MYSTERIOUS)
            sleep(2000)
            display.clear()
        elif message == 'ghost':
            display.show(Image.GHOST)
            audio.play(Sound.HELLO)
            sleep(2000)
            display.clear()    
        
    if button_a.was_pressed():
        radio.send('angry')
        display.show(Image.ANGRY)
        sleep(2000)
        display.clear()
    elif button_b.was_pressed():
        radio.send('skull')
        display.show(Image.SKULL)
        sleep(2000)
        display.clear()
    elif pin_logo.is_touched():
        radio.send('ghost')
        display.show(Image.GHOST)
        sleep(2000)
        display.clear()
